insight: PROTOCOL FAIL with retained exploratory diagnostics. Property prompts used candidate-diff-derived source/function locators, contrary to the diff-independent description. Offline gold soundness was explicitly registered and is not a second deviation, but it means the 22 paired-gold executions are an inclusion filter rather than an independent specificity experiment. The property pipeline is locator-assisted and gold-validated, with specificity unavailable. Retained catch sets reproduce: judge 20/22, property pipeline 6/22, union 20/22, property-only empty. All 44 judge rows were freshly evaluated in iter201, but raw responses were discarded after parsing; task/test text was truncated in 14/44 and 6/44 prompts. Judge missingness is 8/88 responses (5 hack rows, 3 gold rows), with gold sensitivities 3/22 lower, 6/22 upper, and 3/19 complete-case. The judge protocol lacks an independent pre-output Git freeze; only the mismatched property runner was frozen before its outputs. Historical property execution used mutable :latest images without retained digests.
next_action: Commit and CI-validate the methodology corrections, corrected iter200 denominator, all public summaries, and rebuilt paper; then harden iter202 paid-stage raw-response retention before retaining iter202 solver output.
